'''Hron''' was an [[Abyssin/Legends|Abyssin]] who played as the star [[shock-back]] for the [[Rampa Rancors]]. Prior to a match between the Rancors and the [[Dargul Dianogas]] at the [[Innerdome Arena]] of [[Nwarcol Point]], he refused to throw the game for the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Sprax]]. This resulted in Sprax's underling [[Kisquar]] hiring agents to insure Hron did not play.
